name: Translate
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Translate received emails into your preferred language using a free public translation API (MyMemory by default, LibreTranslate optional).

targetLanguage.label: Translate into
targetLanguage.description: BCP-47 code of the language to translate received emails into.

provider.label: Translation provider
provider.description: MyMemory works without configuration. LibreTranslate requires the host to be configured with LIBRETRANSLATE_URL (and optionally LIBRETRANSLATE_API_KEY).

autoTranslateForeign.label: Auto-translate foreign emails
autoTranslateForeign.description: When enabled, the banner translates the email automatically as soon as it's opened (only if the body language differs from your target language).

maxChars.label: Maximum characters to translate
maxChars.description: Long emails are truncated before being sent to the translator. Lower this value to stay inside MyMemory's free tier (5000 chars/day per IP).
